info.title: Intent.RoslynWeaverSanitizer.CLI
info.description: The RoslynWeaver Sanitizer CLI tool can be used to remove all references of Intent code management attributes and NuGet packages from a Visual Studio solution.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A CLI (command line interface) tool which sanitizes/removes Intent code management attributes and NuGet package references from a Visual Studio solution.

arguments.name: sln-path
arguments.description: The path of the .sln file of the solution to sanitize.
